text: Here, inside the clean, slightly sterile embrace of a modern research space, the world feels carefully curated—yet still uncertain. The text on the screen speaks to confusion, blurring, and the comfort of embracing uncertainty. I feel strangely at home amidst this intellectual chaos: open, reflective, unsettled. It’s a place for questions, not answers—where meaning seems to assemble itself only in hindsight. There’s a sense of potential, a hum of curiosity, and a gentle push against the rigid boundaries of understanding.
